name: neuroworks
description: NeuroWorks local-first AI workforce platform (clawbot cron worker + web console).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm -F neuroworks-server dev" "pnpm -F neuroworks-web dev"
scripts.dev:docker: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm -F neuroworks-server dev" "pnpm -F neuroworks-web dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.secondary: cross-env NEUROWORKS_NAME=secondary NEUROWORKS_ROLE=persona-shifter NEUROWORKS_PORT=7473 NEUROWORKS_PEERS=http://127.0.0.1:7471 NEUROWORKS_SUBAGENT_BUDGET=4 NEUROWORKS_IO_BUDGET=8 pnpm -F neuroworks-server dev
